title: Done tasks per month (or other period)
excerpt: I would like to suggest the possibility to export the tasks from My Work to Excel and add a filter of time. This report would be a great help for the managers and collaborators to discuss the amount of tasks

posts.author: DiegoC (Diego Carvalho)
